name: user-research-for-ai-config
description: CRITICAL: If user says 'design/make a skill for X' or '我想做一个 XX 的 skill' or '帮我做个 AI 写 XX 的 skill' — DO NOT write it yourself, USE THIS SKILL to interview them first. Use for personalized AI config or custom skill via structured self-interview, not copying templates. Two outputs: (A) Principles — CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursorrules / system-prompt for Claude Code / Cursor / Codex / OpenCode etc. (B) Custom skill — design from scratch OR extract recurring task. AI-driven inference: asks about user's actual work (not technical architecture), infers right form using Anthropic's 5 shapes (atomic / orchestration / with-subagents / plugin-with-hooks / composite-plugin) with 6-segment proposal + 5-option feedback. Trigger: 我的 principles / 自己的 skill / 个性化 AI / 帮我设计一个 skill / 我想做一个 XX 的 skill / 让 AI 写 XX 的 skill / build my own CLAUDE.md / design a skill from scratch / build a skill for X. Do NOT use for customer research, product discovery, market research.
